text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell launched by WmiPrvSE.exe with a hidden window and an encoded command, followed by suspicious certificate-related registry modifications.",
  "indicators": [
    "WmiPrvSE.exe parent process",
    "powershell -noP",
    "powershell -w 1 (hidden window)",
    "powershell -enc (encoded command)",
    "Base64 encoded command",
    "Incomplete decoded PowerShell script fragment",
    "Registry creation under SystemCertificates\\CA in HKU\\.DEFAULT and HKLM"
  ]
}
